name: Easy Classic Lasagna
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Bulk Italian sausage, cooked and drained
2 cans Classico Di Napoli (Tomato & Basil) Pasta Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Cook lasagna noodles as package directs.
3. In a bowl, combine ricotta, Parmesan cheese and eggs; mix well.
4. On the bottom of a greased baking dish (15x9 inches), spread half a cup of pasta sauce.
5. Top with half each of the lasagna noodles, ricotta cheese mixture, sausage, pasta sauce and mozzarella.
6. Repeat layering.
7. Top with parsley.
8. Cover; bake for 1 hour or until hot and bubbly.
9. Uncover; let stand 15 minutes before serving.
10. Refrigerate leftovers.
